title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Awfis - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Awfis - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!
